mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE WR_TEMP as ( select 1 as level union all select 1 + WR_TEMP.LEVEL from WR_TEMP where WR_TEMP.LEVEL < #{level} ) select concat(compkey , level) as rowkey , #{userInfo.compkey} as compkey , #{warekey} as warekey , #{ownerky} as ownerky , fn_wm_paklbky() as paklbky , '대봉라벨' as paklbnm , M.CUSTKEY as custkey , M.CUNAMLC as cunamlc , level , ' ' as retakey , ' ' as retainm , #{userInfo.useract} as creuser , #{userInfo.useract} as lmouser from WR_TEMP inner join MCUSMA M on M.COMPKEY = #{userInfo.compkey} and M.OWNERKY = #{ownerky} and M.CUSTKEY = #{custkey} where level >= 1
mapper.insert: insert into WSLBMA( COMPKEY , PAKLBKY , WAREKEY , PAKLBNM , CUSTKEY , CUNAMLC , RETAKEY , RETAINM , CREDATE , CRETIME , CREUSER , LMODATE , LMOTIME , LMOUSER )values( #{compkey} , #{paklbky} , #{warekey} , #{paklbnm} , #{custkey} , #{cunamlc} , #{retakey} , #{retainm} , to_char(now() , 'yyyymmdd') , to_char(now() , 'hh24miss') , #{creuser} , to_char(now() , 'yyyymmdd') , to_char(now() , 'hh24miss') , #{lmouser} )
mapper.select: select fn_om_invhseq() as invhseq from dual

{ CALL sp_om_invoice( #{compkey}, #{invhseq}, #{invokey}, #{ownerky}, #{custkey}, #{retakey}, #{vendkey}, #{orderno}, #{allgrky}, #{stadate}, #{enddate}, #{loguser}, #{O_OMSGKEY, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{O_ORESULT, mode=OUT, jdbcType=INTEGER} ) }
{ CALL sp_om_invoice_man( #{compkey}, #{invhseq}, #{loguser}, #{O_OMSGKEY, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{O_ORESULT, mode=OUT, jdbcType=INTEGER} ) }
{ CALL sp_wm_invoice_picking( #{compkey}, #{invhseq}, #{invokey}, #{allgrky}, #{loguser}, #{O_OMSGKEY, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{O_ORESULT, mode=OUT, jdbcType=INTEGER} ) }

select SH.COMPKEY as compkey , TS.ALLGRKY as allgrky , date_format(OS.POSTDAT, '%Y-%m-%d') as postdat , MH.CUNAMLC as custnam , MC.CUNAMLC as retanam , OS.COOUTKY as cooutky , COUNT(distinct SP.PRINTSQ) as ordprcn , ifnull(max(OH.PAYORTY),'') as payorty , ifnull(max(OH.VIAMTYN),'') as viamtyn , ifnull(max(OH.ORDTAMT),0) as ordtamt from WSHPIT SH inner join MCUSMA MH on MH.COMPKEY = SH.COMPKEY and MH.CUSTKEY = SH.CUSTKEY inner join MCUSMA MC on MC.COMPKEY = SH.COMPKEY and MC.CUSTKEY = SH.RETAKEY inner join ( select COMPKEY, WAREKEY, OWNERKY, ALLGRKY, PICKTYP, REFSODC, REFSOIT , sum(FORDQTY) as fordqty , sum(TCMPQTY) as tcmpqty , sum(SHDVSQT) as shdvsqt , sum(SHDVEQT) as shdveqt from WTAKIT t where 1 = 1 and t.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and t.OWNERKY = #{ownerky} and t.DOCCATE = '500' and t.DOCTYPE = '520' and t.TASKSTS not in ('CANCEL') group by REFSODC, REFSOIT ) TS on SH.COMPKEY = TS.COMPKEY and SH.WAREKEY = TS.WAREKEY and SH.OWNERKY = TS.OWNERKY and SH.REFSODC = TS.REFSODC and SH.REFSOIT = TS.REFSOIT inner join OCOSAL OS on SH.COMPKEY = OS.COMPKEY and SH.REFSODC = OS.COOUTKY and SH.REFSOIT = OS.COOUTIT left join OCOSAH OH on SH.COMPKEY = OH.COMPKEY and SH.REFSODC = OH.COOUTKY and OH.STEMPYN != 'Y' left join SPRTHI SP on SH.COMPKEY = SP.COMPKEY and SH.REFSODC = SP.REFSODC where SH.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and SH.WAREKEY = #{warekey} and SH.OWNERKY = #{ownerky} and TS.ALLGRKY = #{allgrky} group by SH.COMPKEY, TS.ALLGRKY, OS.POSTDAT, MH.CUNAMLC, MC.CUNAMLC, OS.COOUTKY order by OS.POSTDAT, MH.CUNAMLC, MC.CUNAMLC
